meaning: n.汉学家,研究中国文化者
examples: Mr. Robert Hans van Gulik, born in Zutphen, the Netherlands in 1910, was a highly educated sinologist.
His scientific background is that of a geographer Sinologist und ethnologist.
Joseph Edkins (1823-1905) is a famous Sinologist and missionary of London missionary Society.
To find out, we went to an expert: Rupert Hoogewerf, an accountant and sinologist who spent two years living in Shanghai.
An 1883 profile portrait of Henri Cordier, an eminent Sinologist, writing in his study surrounded by books and papers reveals a touch of Edgar Degas.
